Title: Opensource AI Must Win
Description: Civilizational intelligence infrastructure must remain free to study, build, deploy, and run, not rented from closed institutions.

Title: Palantir loses legal challenge against Swiss investigative magazine
Description: Peter Thiel-chaired data intelligence group sued publication over reports that Switzerland rejected its approaches

Title: All about electric motors with no rare earths
Description: As a pioneer of electric motors using no rare earths, Renault Group is unique on the automotive market, a position reasserted for strategic reasons.

Title: How to Setup a Local Coding Agent on macOS
Description: Running Gemma 4 26B-A4B and Qwen3.6 35B-A3B locally with llama.cpp, MTP speculative decoding, multimodal support, and PI as a coding agent.

Title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
Description: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.

Title: I Am Not a Reverse Centaur
Description: About a year ago I wrote on this blog about how coding with LLMs would not work for me, even if there were no ethical or environmental concerns preventing me to use them. I'm not going to repeat the…

Title: “Don’t You Just Upload It to ChatGPT?”
Description: Can ChatGPT replace translators? A freelance translator shares a funny Ottawa story about AI translation, professional judgment and why human expertise still matters.
